_doc: PR#534 quality-gate cells for the >=90%-of-base gate table. Pass this file to the harness via --gate-cells. Each benchmark has three roles: base = vanilla gemma-4-E4B-it, ship_12k = the live 12k-head surgical-357 ship, base_fullhead = the corrected base-int4 native-262k-head ship served from google/gemma-4-E4B-it-qat-w4a16-ct (fern #535 serve_ok PPL 2.006 byte-exact). The gate compares base_fullhead/base >= 0.90. Cells are EXTERNAL measurements handed to this card via PR#534 (isolation forbids pulling them from ubel/fern/wirbel branches). Leave a cell null until its number lands; the scaffold composes a partial-but-honest table at any time. Full-head clears >=90% BY CONSTRUCTION (prune OFF => base-identical head => no token -inf'd); these cells are the empirical confirmation.
_concurrency_rule: Advisor 00:02Z: the served protocol is concurrency=32 and the metric is concurrency-DOMINATED (the unchanged stock base swings 0.100 @ conc=1 -> 0.267 @ conc=32). Record the concurrency each role was measured at; build_gate_table refuses a definitive meets_90pct for any benchmark whose base vs base_fullhead concurrencies disagree or are unrecorded. Compare like-for-like at conc=32.

_sources.gsm8k.base: vanilla gemma-4-E4B-it GSM8K (matched-concurrency base, wirbel #541 harness)
_sources.gsm8k.base_fullhead: wirbel #541 GSM8K leg on the #535 base-int4 full-head (n=500, seed=1234, sampled+greedy)
_sources.aime.base_fullhead: fern #535 base-int4 AIME-greedy (matched-concurrency n~90; the n=30 number was concurrency-confounded)
_sources.mmlu_pro.base_fullhead: ubel #527 K=full / base-int4 head -- DEFERRED/CONDITIONAL: only measured if GSM8K AND AIME both clear >=90%

gsm8k.source: wirbel #541 (bfvbueb1/f4u9yf9z, merged 92ac360): n=500 seed=1234 conc=32 sampled-primary. base_fullhead=0.854 is the min_tokens=8 gate arm (advisor 01:08Z): the as-served 0.762 is depressed by ~10.4% first-token-EOS empties (completion_tokens=1, content='') -- a SERVING artifact, not reasoning loss; min_tokens=8 recovers 45/52. Request-level floor; served-by-default confirm pending wirbel #545.
